description: Demo the full pause/resume/stop loop with a hex-coder worker generating a simple counter

phases.name: Start hex-coder worker

tasks.name: Start worker in background
tasks.description: Start hex agent worker --role hex-coder in background
tasks.done_command: pgrep -f 'hex agent worker' && echo RUNNING || echo STOPPED

phases.done_command: pgrep -f 'hex agent worker' > /dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Send pause to worker
tasks.description: hex agent pause <worker_id> while worker is running

tasks.name: Check worker state
tasks.description: Verify worker shows pause message in logs
tasks.done_command: ps aux | grep -i pause || echo NO_PAUSE
